description.name: Snippe Payment Gateway
description.tagline: Accept mobile money, card, and QR payments in Tanzania via Snippe hosted checkout.
description.long: Snippe lets you collect TZS payments from M-Pesa, Airtel Money, Mixx by Yas, Halotel, Visa, Mastercard, and dynamic QR through a single hosted checkout URL. This WHMCS module creates a Snippe checkout session per invoice and redirects the customer to a mobile-optimised payment page; paid invoices are reconciled automatically via signed webhooks.
features: Hosted checkout with mobile money, card, and QR
TZS settlement to your Snippe balance
No PCI scope — Snippe hosts the payment page
